CustomField.description: JSON object mapping each tracked field API name to an array of recipient email addresses. Use "*" as a wildcard key to receive alerts for all field changes. Wildcard recipients are always notified on top of any field-specific recipients. If a field has no mapping and there is no "*" key, no email is sent for that field.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter a JSON object. Each key is a tracked field API name (e.g. "Name__c"), its value is an array of email addresses. Use "*" to subscribe to all fields. Example: {"Name__c": ["a@x.com"], "*": ["admin@x.com"]}
CustomField.label: Alert Recipients (JSON)
